files.purpose: Define the RSObservation data model for normalized orbital observations
requirements: Include an ObservationNormalizer component
Include an OrbitPropagator component
Include a DeviationScorer component
Include an AnomalyClassifier component
Include a GuardrailGateway component
Include a ReviewQueueManager component
Include a DegradedModeHandler component
Include an AuditTrailWriter component
Define an RSObservation model with object_id, timestamp, position_eci, velocity_eci, sensor_source, and data_quality
Define an AnomalyRecord model with anomaly_id, observation_id, object_id, anomaly_type, deviation_score, confidence, status, guardrail_cleared, operator_review_required, reason_codes, and reasoning
Include API surface for observation ingest and anomaly review
Include audit trail persistence hooks
Include degraded-mode handling behavior
Include Guardrail policy enforcement before escalation or outbound action
RSObservation must be implemented as a Python dataclass named RSObservation
RSObservation must include typed fields: object_id, timestamp, position_eci, velocity_eci, sensor_source, data_quality
RSObservation must include a validate() method that raises ValueError when data_quality is outside 0.0 to 1.0
AnomalyRecord must be implemented as a Python dataclass named AnomalyRecord
AnomalyRecord must include status values: pending, approved, rejected
AnomalyRecord must include a mark_reviewed(status: str) method
AnomalyRecord must include typed fields: anomaly_id, observation_id, object_id, anomaly_type, deviation_score, confidence, status, guardrail_cleared, operator_review_required, reason_codes, reasoning
AnomalyClassifier must be implemented as a Python class named AnomalyClassifier
AnomalyClassifier must expose a classify(observation, expected_state) method
classify must return anomaly_type and confidence
anomaly_type must be one of: RPO, maneuver, conjunction, or unknown
ObservationNormalizer must expose normalize_observation(raw_data: dict) -> dict
ObservationNormalizer must return a normalized observation structure with object_id, timestamp, position_eci, velocity_eci, sensor_source, and data_quality
OrbitPropagator must expose propagate_orbit(normalized_observation: dict, time_step: float) -> dict
OrbitPropagator must return expected_position_eci and expected_velocity_eci
DeviationScorer must expose score_deviation(observed_state: dict, expected_state: dict) -> float
AnomalyClassifier classify must return anomaly_type and confidence using keys with exactly those names
GuardrailGateway must expose enforce_policy(anomaly_record: dict) -> bool
ReviewQueueManager must expose submit_for_review(anomaly_record: dict) -> dict
ReviewQueueManager must expose update_review_status(anomaly_id: str, status: str) -> dict
ingest_observation must normalize input, compute expected state, score deviation, classify anomaly, and return anomaly_type, confidence, and deviation_score
review_anomaly must accept only approved or rejected status values

files.purpose: Provide review and escalation entry points for anomaly records
requirements: Include an ObservationNormalizer component
Include an OrbitPropagator component
Include a DeviationScorer component
Include an AnomalyClassifier component
Include a GuardrailGateway component
Include a ReviewQueueManager component
Include a DegradedModeHandler component
Include an AuditTrailWriter component
Define an RSObservation model with object_id, timestamp, position_eci, velocity_eci, sensor_source, and data_quality
Define an AnomalyRecord model with anomaly_id, observation_id, object_id, anomaly_type, deviation_score, confidence, status, guardrail_cleared, operator_review_required, reason_codes, and reasoning
Include API surface for observation ingest and anomaly review
Include audit trail persistence hooks
Include degraded-mode handling behavior
Include Guardrail policy enforcement before escalation or outbound action
RSObservation must be implemented as a Python dataclass named RSObservation
RSObservation must include typed fields: object_id, timestamp, position_eci, velocity_eci, sensor_source, data_quality
RSObservation must include a validate() method that raises ValueError when data_quality is outside 0.0 to 1.0
AnomalyRecord must be implemented as a Python dataclass named AnomalyRecord
AnomalyRecord must include status values: pending, approved, rejected
AnomalyRecord must include a mark_reviewed(status: str) method
AnomalyRecord must include typed fields: anomaly_id, observation_id, object_id, anomaly_type, deviation_score, confidence, status, guardrail_cleared, operator_review_required, reason_codes, reasoning
AnomalyClassifier must be implemented as a Python class named AnomalyClassifier
AnomalyClassifier must expose a classify(observation, expected_state) method
classify must return anomaly_type and confidence
anomaly_type must be one of: RPO, maneuver, conjunction, or unknown
ObservationNormalizer must expose normalize_observation(raw_data: dict) -> dict
ObservationNormalizer must return a normalized observation structure with object_id, timestamp, position_eci, velocity_eci, sensor_source, and data_quality
OrbitPropagator must expose propagate_orbit(normalized_observation: dict, time_step: float) -> dict
OrbitPropagator must return expected_position_eci and expected_velocity_eci
DeviationScorer must expose score_deviation(observed_state: dict, expected_state: dict) -> float
AnomalyClassifier classify must return anomaly_type and confidence using keys with exactly those names
GuardrailGateway must expose enforce_policy(anomaly_record: dict) -> bool
ReviewQueueManager must expose submit_for_review(anomaly_record: dict) -> dict
ReviewQueueManager must expose update_review_status(anomaly_id: str, status: str) -> dict
ingest_observation must normalize input, compute expected state, score deviation, classify anomaly, and return anomaly_type, confidence, and deviation_score
review_anomaly must accept only approved or rejected status values
